npc.old_man.name: Old Man
npc.old_man.dialogue.day.0: During the day, the road to town is safer.
npc.old_man.dialogue.night.0: Night is falling. The slimes change.
npc.old_man.dialogue.night.1: If you survive, come talk to me again at dawn.
npc.merchant.name: Merchant
npc.merchant.dialogue.default.0: I have potions, keys, and rumors.
npc.merchant.dialogue.default.1: Come back when you have more coins.
npc.merchant.dialogue.day.0: Good morning. The shop is open.
npc.merchant.dialogue.day.1: If you need supplies, now is the best time.
npc.merchant.dialogue.night.1: Torches and potions would sell better now.
object.coin.name: Bronze Coin
object.key.name: Dungeon Key
object.door.name: Wooden Door
object.chest.name: Chest
